data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Reversal/chargeback-aware commission adjustments', but there is no evidence in the prior steps that directly addresses this requirement. The prior steps focus on various aspects of the booking and financial processes, such as creating offers and validating bookings, but do not include any checks or validations related to commission adjustments in the event of reversals or chargebacks. This indicates a clear gap in the coverage of the requirement, as no evidence was recorded to confirm or deny its satisfaction.
gaps: No evidence of validation for reversal/chargeback-aware commission adjustments.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add validation for commission adjustments
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify reversal/chargeback-aware commission adjustments.
